title: ホープフルSの後に・大三角は描かれる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's resolve pays off, and she runs
spectacularly in the Hopeful Stakes. She sets her
sights on the Classic Triple Crown for even
greater glory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired, Narita Top Road secures first place in
her own race the following day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As these classmates bloom one after the other, so
too does the excitement surrounding their
generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With such strong contenders in the mix, we begin
our training for the Satsuki Sho, the first race of
the Classic Triple Crown.
